_comment: Structural validation rules for AI-extracted invoice records. Deliberately separate from config/ai/gemini.json -- these rules apply regardless of which AI provider produced the extraction, or even if the legacy pdfplumber fallback did. Nothing provider-specific belongs in this file.

_notes.confidence_threshold: Records with extraction_confidence below this go to validation_document_review_queue, not Bronze. A record with NO confidence value supplied (provider didn't return one) is not rejected for that reason alone -- see src/validation/extraction_validator.py.
_notes.date_fields: Validated loosely here (does it look date-shaped?) -- full parsing against the vendor's actual date_format happens in Silver, per 'no AI inside Silver, keep Silver exactly as designed'.
